mlb.headline: Mariners' Cal Raleigh takes first swings off tee amid oblique recovery
mlb.summary: Cal Raleigh, who was placed on the injured list May 14 with a right oblique strain, took his first swings since the Seattle Mariners catcher aggravated an injury to his right side.

nhl.headline: Hurricanes aim to break through Eastern Conference Final in Game 5 against Canadiens
nhl.summary: — The Carolina Hurricanes have put themselves in position to bury the storyline about hitting that same ol' Eastern Conference Final roadblock.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Spurs-Thunder Game 7 preview, picks, X factors
nba.summary: Spurs-Thunder is headed to Game 7. What was most surprising about San Antonio's Game 6 win? And who is the biggest X factor for Saturday's game?

nba.headline: Thunder to be without injured Jalen Williams for Game 7
nba.summary: Thunder wing Jalen Williams, who has been hampered by injuries all season, will not play in Saturday's Game 7 against the Spurs.

tennis.headline: Frances Tiafoe recovers racket from fan after French Open celebration
tennis.summary: American tennis star Tiafoe lost his racket while celebrating his French Open victory only to recover it after asking for it back on Instagram.

tennis.headline: US Open adding qualifying round for mixed doubles tournament
tennis.summary: The U.S. Open is adding a qualifying round to its mixed doubles tournament, a boost for traditional doubles specialists who were largely shut out of last year's event in favor of singles stars.
